one_line_ask: From the client's raw chicken-bowl hero photo, raw 4K product-showcase footage, raw phone-recorded voiceover, and flat logo PNG, produce a retouched website-banner hero still, a vertical + square + landscape cutdown set of the product-showcase video, a denoised voiceover, a screen-print-ready vector logo, and a moodboard of the package.
brief:
Scale My Meal Prep has delegated this week's creative package for the client "Fuel'd Kitchen", who is launching a High-Protein Chicken Bowl. The client uploaded four raw assets: (1) a hand-held studio hero photograph of the plated chicken bowl (slightly tilted, mixed lighting, flat color, shot wider than the banner crop), (2) ~70 seconds of raw 4K horizontal product-showcase b-roll of the bowl being assembled and steaming, (3) a phone-recorded founder voiceover ("Real food, prepped for real life…") with room hiss and HVAC hum, and (4) a flat full-color PNG of the Fuel'd Kitchen wordmark logo for the meal-prep container labels.

Deliverables for the package:
- ONE retouched, on-brand hero still for the website banner and Facebook/Instagram feed ad: leveled horizon, cleanly cropped, auto-toned and color-corrected, warmer appetizing temperature, the bowl made to pop against a softened background, then canvas-extended at the top so it can also run as a tall hero banner.
- ONE supporting steam/texture still licensed from Adobe Stock, color-matched to the hero look, for the email header and landing-page background.
- A THREE-format social cutdown of the product-showcase video — 9:16 for
